## Summary

Describe the fork phase or product change and the user-facing behavior.

## OpenSpec and Phase Scope

- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` and the active OpenSpec change before editing.
- [ ] This PR stays inside the current roadmap phase scope.
- [ ] This PR does not delete upstream React Email code unless the phase says
      to do so.
- [ ] Any product decision or tradeoff is recorded in `docs/decision-log.md`.

## Tests and Baseline

- [ ] I ran the smallest affected test set.
- [ ] I ran broader checks or documented why they were skipped.
- [ ] Command output or a concise result summary is recorded in the relevant
      phase notes.

## PDF Builder Safety

- [ ] DocRaptor credentials remain server-only.
- [ ] Donor and financial data remain private by default.
- [ ] Structured template JSON remains the editable source of truth.
- [ ] Generated output is deterministic where snapshots or render logs apply.

## Handoff

- [ ] I updated the roadmap or phase handoff notes.
- [ ] I listed known risks, follow-up tasks, and skipped checks.
